title: SQL Support on Informix
text: SQL Support on Informix The sql ProcScript command and the SQL Editor are supported. Monitoring SQL in the message frame This is supported, although you cannot see the actual values used in the SQL statements. Special Considerations Consider the following: For the single connection mechanism, never use the commit work or rollback instructions in an SQL string with the sql instruction, or in SQL Edit. However, if you do not have an Informix front-end and you have not yet created an Informix database, you cannot log on to Informix. In this case, use SQL Edit. You cannot select, insert or update BLOB fields in SQL Edit or with the sql instruction. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
